untranslatable_reason: Broadening Bottom pattern formation detection requires price pattern recognition (identifying converging/diverging price action over multiple bars) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators. The pattern itself (identification of highs/lows diverging while lows converge) would require custom pattern detection logic not available in the indicator set. Entry conditions approximated using pivot-based breakout, but true pattern identification is untranslatable.
translation_notes: Signal requires detection of specific price pattern (broadening bottom with downward breakout). Approximated entry using close below pivot point with volume confirmation. Exit uses mean reversion to SMA_20 as a reasonable reversal condition per Rule 8. Success rates (62% bull, 34% bear) and performance metrics documented in source but not operationalized as they are historical statistics, not forward-looking rule conditions.
